description: Class Gene-Ontology-Terms is the root of the Gene Ontology (GO). In a PGDB, gene products (including monomers, multimers, and chemically modified forms thereof) are assigned to GO terms in this hierarchy. Note that a PGDB does not contain the entire GO ontology, it contains only those terms (and their parents) to which gene products have been assigned. To browse the entire GO ontology, visit the GO website.
name: Gene Ontology Terms
